summary: Comprehensive testing of i18n (internationalization) multi-language support and CMS admin features. All 10 requested features tested and working correctly. Language switcher supports EN/ES/FR/PT with proper translations. Admin CMS panel loads without errors.
context_for_next_testing_agent: i18n multi-language support fully tested. Language switcher in header works for EN/ES/FR/PT. Translations persist in localStorage. Admin CMS panel works with provided credentials. Country codes are 3-letter ISO (e.g., NGA for Nigeria, not NG).

language_switcher_dropdown.details: Globe icon in header opens dropdown with 4 languages: English, Español, Français, Português

spanish_translations.details: All UI elements translate correctly - 'Get Help Now' → 'Obtener Ayuda Ahora', stats labels, trust indicators, footer

french_translations.details: All UI elements translate correctly - 'Get Help Now' → 'Obtenir de l'Aide', stats labels, trust indicators

portuguese_translations.details: All UI elements translate correctly - 'Get Help Now' → 'Obter Ajuda Agora', stats labels, trust indicators

language_persistence.details: Language preference stored in localStorage (i18nextLng) and persists after page reload

admin_login.details: Login with admin@unitedrehabs.com / admin_password works correctly, returns JWT token

admin_cms_page.details: CMS Pages section loads with tabs for About Us, Privacy Policy, Terms of Service, Legal Disclaimer, Accessibility, Affiliate Disclosure. HTML editor, Preview, SEO settings all functional

homepage_trust_indicators.details: Trust indicators section displays with translated labels (People Affected, Treatment Centers, Recovery Rate, Treatment Admissions)

nigeria_country_page.details: /nigeria-addiction-rehabs loads with Nigeria flag, Africa region, Key Statistics (2025), Historical Trends charts, data source citation

rehab_centers_page.details: /rehab-centers loads with 'Find Treatment Centers Worldwide' title, shows 104 centers, filter options (country, type), featured centers with ratings
